title: Use dependency-style relation names
problem: The first real extraction used a proves relation in a direction that made counterexample/theorem semantics ambiguous.
proposed_change: Rename proof/computation relations to proved_by and computed_by, and add refuted_by with prompt examples.
acceptance_criteria: Retraction examples represent theorem <- refuted_by <- counterexample under dependent/prerequisite semantics.

history.note: Second mr4660140 extraction produced refuted_by in the intended direction.
